features.evidence: Bright, sharp screen. I did mess up putting the screen protector on.
The 5a has a rear capacitive fingerprint reader that still is considered one of the best ever. If you don't use the fingerprint reader you may like this phone,
This phone does everything I need and has a great battery that lasts over a day. Looking forward to seeing how much more battery life I get when I figure out how to disable it completely.
However, the camera still is very good compared to other similar priced phones. My girlfriend's phone has a fancy camera
I am getting used to Pixel and have learned to appreciate Pixel software. I was frustrated with Samsung software.

Pixel phones in general have impressed me with performance and value, and this latest Pixel 10a is no exception. Fast enough for my needs - I don't do hardcore gaming on my phone, it's fast enough for just about everything else.
Pixel phones in general have impressed me with performance and value, and this latest Pixel 10a is no exception. Very good price for what you get.
Excellent sound quality with and without buds.
